task_completion.description: Verify that Maria Espinal is selected as the patient for the appointment.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The name 'Maria Espinal' (and optionally DOB '1964-08-17' or PID '2') should be visible in the patient field of the appointment scheduling window.

task_completion.description: Verify that the appointment is set for a 15-minute duration.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The duration field or time slot should indicate a 15-minute length (e.g., 15 mins, or start/end times 15 minutes apart).

task_completion.description: Verify that the appointment date is set within the required 7-day timeframe.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The selected date in the scheduling window or calendar view should be within 7 days of the current system date.

task_completion.description: Verify that the appointment time is between 9:00 AM and 4:00 PM.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The start time of the appointment should be between 09:00 and 16:00.

task_completion.description: Verify that the correct comment is added to the appointment.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The comment field should contain 'Routine follow-up visit' or similar keywords like 'routine', 'follow', 'visit'.

task_completion.description: Verify that the appointment has been successfully saved and scheduled.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The appointment should appear on the calendar view, or a success message confirming the appointment creation should be visible.

integrity.description: The agent used the graphical user interface of the medical scheduling software.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interaction with a web browser or EMR application interface, not a terminal or script editor.

integrity.description: The agent did not just type the appointment details into a text editor or note-taking app.
integrity.visual_evidence: The inputs are entered into actual form fields within the scheduling application.

integrity.description: The appointment is genuinely reflected in the application's calendar.
integrity.visual_evidence: The final screenshot shows the calendar grid with the newly created appointment block.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Patient: Maria Espinal (PID 2), DOB: 1964-08-17. Appointment parameters: Minimum duration of 15 minutes. Date: 7 days ahead. Time: Between 09:00 and 16:00. Expected comment keywords: 'routine', 'follow', 'visit', 'check'.
